status.description: This is the status of the transaction.

message.description: This is the message that provides additional information of successful transaction.

data.description: This provides information on the transaction performed.

supplierId.description: This is the supplier id that identifies a seller company.

itemsList.description: This is the item list that the seller sells.

itemId.description: This is the item which supplier sells to the company.

createdAt.description: This is the date on which the seller is added to the supplier list of the Grocery store.

value.message: New supplier added to supplier list successfully

Example 1.message: We are experiencing technical difficulties. Please try again later.

examples.message: We are experiencing technical difficulties. Please try again later.
An item with this Item Number already exists in the system.

details.reason: Validation error.Fields invalid - totalItemCount - Value must be a positive integer

examples.errorMessage: Authentication required. Please provide a valid API key or login to continue.
The requested item could not be found.

schema.description: Error Component standard across all operations.

status.description: This describes the status of the transaction. In the error scenario ddefault value will be 'error'.

errorType.description: This describes the exact error Type. Adds more info on why the transaction failed.

errorMessage.description: This describes the supporting or more descriptive error msg for a particular error type.

details.description: This describes the extra details for finding the root cause.

traceId.description: Unique id for the particular transaction.

reason.description: Additional details that adds to the failure root cause.

itemNo.description: This is the unique identifying number for the whole transaction. This comes in request.This is also optional if the error is related to incoming request parameters, then this will be coming in response.

conflictingField.description: If there are any conflicting fields on that particular transaction and due to which the whole operation failed then this will be coming in response. It is optional field.

schema.title: ErrorResponse
